name: click-to-edit
note: View↔edit on an `editing` flag; PUT persists; props re-render.

name: bulk-update
note: Checkbox changes stage a draft; one POST applies all + toast.

name: click-to-load
note: Fetch next page, concat to page-owned array, re-render.

name: delete-row
note: Round-trip clean, but fade-out needs a `deleting` class + `setTimeout`; coarse re-render yanks the node instantly otherwise.

name: edit-row
note: Page owns rows + one `editingId`; other Edit buttons disabled while editing.

name: lazy-load
note: Fetched fragment ships a `<script type="jst">` def + markup; auto-upgraded on insert.

name: inline-validation
note: Plain input (keeps focus) POSTs per keystroke; `<field-status>` renders verdict.

name: infinite-scroll
note: Data/append idiomatic, but the trigger is a hand-wired IntersectionObserver re-attached after each render (no `revealed` trigger).

name: active-search
note: Results component clean; page-level debounce/fetch trigger is still hand-written.

name: progress-bar
note: Bar is prop-driven, but polling is a hand-written `setInterval` (no `every Ns`).

name: value-select (cascading)
note: `change` fetches models, sets a prop on `<model-select>`.

name: tabs-hateoas
note: Each tab fetch returns a fresh component def + markup; auto-upgraded. Pure HATEOAS — JST's core strength.

name: dialogs (custom modal)
note: Server-fed modal content with `jst-transition` for fade/zoom enter and leave.

name: sortable
note: Native HTML5 DnD via `@dragstart/@dragover/@drop`; reorders a page array + POSTs order. `jst-key` preserves row identity when needed.

name: keyboard-shortcuts
note: Result panel clean, but global shortcut is a hand-written `document.addEventListener` (`@event` only binds template elements).

name: polling / update-other-content
note: One response updating two regions is idiomatic; polling itself is a hand-written `setInterval`.

name: x-data + counter
note: Params are reactive scope; `el.count = el.count + 1` updates own state.

name: x-text
note: `$(expr)` escaped text interpolation.

name: x-html
note: `$(raw(expr))` opts out of escaping.

name: x-bind (class & attrs)
note: Interpolation in attribute value and name position.

name: x-on (events + key modifiers)
note: `@event` covers listeners plus `.enter`, `.prevent`, `.stop`, `.outside`, and debounce modifiers.

name: x-model (text/checkbox/select)
note: `jst-model` binds local text, checkbox, and select state.

name: x-show
note: `style="$(open?'':'display:none')"` keeps node mounted.

name: x-if
note: `$ if (cond) { … }` includes/excludes from render.

name: x-for
note: `$ items.forEach(...)` with `jst-key` when identity matters.

name: x-transition
note: `jst-transition` coordinates enter/leave classes; CSS owns the animation.

name: x-ref + $refs
note: No `$refs` registry; `el.querySelector(...)` instead.

name: x-init
note: No template init hook; one-time guard + `queueMicrotask`.

name: x-effect
note: Effect = template body, but coarse (any prop change), not dep-tracked.

name: $dispatch
note: `el.emit(name, detail)` bubbling CustomEvent.

name: $store (global)
note: Shared object passed via props; manually re-published to subscribers.

name: $watch
note: No watch; funnel mutations through one setter that captures old→new.

name: x-cloak
note: **Better:** custom-element `:not(:defined){display:none}` — zero JS.

name: x-teleport
note: No teleport; hoisted modal to a body-level component driven by events.

name: dropdown (click-outside)
note: Open/close local state plus `@click.outside`.

name: tabs
note: Active tab is local state; no gap.

name: Hello World
note: Reactive text exact; the v-model input is manual `.value` + `@input`.

name: Handling Input
note: "methods" are plain functions from `@click`.

name: Attribute Bindings
note: Interpolation + `.disabled` prop binding.

name: Conditionals & Loops
note: `$ if/else`, `$ forEach`.

name: Form Bindings (v-model)
note: `jst-model` covers native text, checkbox, radio, select, checkbox-array, and multi-select cases; component v-model conventions are still manual.

name: Simple Component (props)
note: Primitives via attrs, rich via `.todo="$(item)"`.

name: Component events ($emit)
note: `el.emit` + `addEventListener`.

name: Computed
note: Derive inline with `$ const`; no memoization.

name: Watchers
note: Side effect runs in the mutating handler.

name: Lifecycle
note: `mounted` approximable with a microtask; teardown uses `onDisconnect(fn)`.

name: Slots (default + named)
note: `$(slot())`, `$(slot('name','fallback'))` native.

name: provide / inject
note: `el.closest()` to read ancestor; not auto-reactive.

name: Template refs
note: `el.querySelector(...)` after render.

name: Class & Style bindings
note: No object/array sugar, but expression-built strings cover it.

name: Fetching Data
note: Fetch/render exact; initial fetch page-driven (no onMounted).

name: Markdown Editor
note: `$(raw())` renders md; property-aware morphing keeps the textarea stable.

name: Grid (sort/search)
note: Local state; filtered/sorted rows derived inline.

name: TodoMVC
note: Full feature set; explicit parent-owned input events and a queued re-focus for edit mode. *(behaviourally verified)*

name: List transitions
note: `jst-key` + `jst-transition` cover enter/leave/move classes; full FLIP transition-group behavior still needs custom JS.

name: Modal with transition
note: No `<transition>`; kept in DOM, class toggled, CSS does enter+leave.

name: useState (counter)
note: A prop is local state; instances independent. *(verified)*

name: Passing props
note: Rich via `.person`, primitives via attrs.

name: Rendering lists (keys)
note: `jst-key` preserves node identity across reorders.

name: Conditional rendering
note: `$ if/else`; empty branch = "render null".

name: Responding to events
note: `@event` + `el.emit`; stopPropagation works.

name: Controlled inputs
note: `jst-model` keeps local state as the source of truth; form-property morphing preserves focus/caret.

name: Lifting state up
note: JST's native model.

name: Effects + fetching
note: Guarded render block + stale-response guard; teardown can use `onDisconnect`, but there is no effect dependency model.

name: Context (useContext)
note: Prop-drill + page store; intermediates must forward.

name: Refs (useRef)
note: DOM ref via `querySelector`; mutable ref via `el._x`.

name: Children / composition
note: `$(slot())` + named slots 1:1.

name: useReducer
note: Plain `reducer(state, action)` in the page; dispatch reassigns.

name: Thinking in React (filter table)
note: Lifted state, explicit events, derived table rendering, and stable controlled inputs map cleanly.

name: Tic-tac-toe (time travel)
note: Immutable history + currentMove in page; board is a dumb renderer. *(verified incl. time travel)*
